title: Smoky Baked Cod with Russian Dressing
description: A flavorful and refreshing cod dish with a smoky twist, paired with a tangy Russian dressing.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Place cod fillets on the baking sheet.
Drizzle with Russian dressing and sprinkle with smoked paprika.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, bake sweet potatoes in the oven for 45-60 minutes or until tender.
Mash or slice sweet potatoes and set aside.
In a small bowl, mix together chopped parsley and thinly sliced onion.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve cod with roasted sweet potatoes and garnish with parsley mixture.
